programmes.show_description: Brian Pillman - Part One: Wrestling documentary series. Brian Pillman claws his way to infamy with a ground-breaking performance that will lead to his ultimate destruction.
A Well Fashioned Fit Up: Drama series about a loveable rogue. Arthur's sortie into haute couture lacks the glamour he anticipated when he and not Terry ends up minding the frocks.
The Last Thing You Want Is to Wind Up with a Hump: American sitcom about a well-off bachelor. Charlie attends one of Jake's football games after a drunken night out in Las Vegas.
Did You Check with the Captain of the Flying Monkeys?: American sitcom. Charlie rethinks the way he treats women when his mother puts him in an uncomfortable situation.

This programme brings you up to date with the latest action from the world of motorsport and features race coverage, insights, and behind-the-scenes footage from the best series.
Shopping from home.
A look back at the wide variety of sports covered by ITV during the 1970s - from horse racing to table football and Formula One to darts - that includes many memorable moments.
Brian Moore presents a special FA Cup Fourth Round edition from January 1978 as West Ham United face QPR, Bristol Rovers challenge Southampton, and Middlesbrough take on Everton.
An edition from February 1978 with Fulham taking on Tottenham Hotspur, Blackpool and Blackburn Rovers battling in a seven-goal thriller, and Nottingham Forest hosting Wolves.
Messenger of the Gods: Classic 1970s police series. Regan and Carter believe Lukey Rix to be a suspect when a consignment of mercury is stolen, but Lukey has an alibi.
Leonna Mayor and the team are at Newbury ahead of another busy day of racing.
Brian Moore introduces football highlights from November 1971, including the game of the season so far - a pulsating derby between Manchester City and Manchester United.
Henry Cole and his partners in grime Allen Millyard and Guy Willison hit the road again to secure vintage finds to sell at Kempton racecourse.
A selection of dramatic horse racing finishes from ITV Racing's coverage that features thrilling races from Cheltenham, Aintree, Ascot and York.
Ed Chamberlin presents live racing from Newbury, Kelso and Bangor. Today's feature meeting is at Newbury, where the Mares' Hurdle final and the Goffs Bumper are the highlights.
Wartime drama film sequel starring Harrison Ford and Robert Shaw, 1978. A team of misfit military experts are tasked with destroying a bridge that is vital to a German scheme.

Action from across the Football League, including Blackburn v Middlesbrough, Ipswich v Millwall, QPR v Portsmouth and Swansea v Coventry in the Championship.
Hard-hitting action from the world of All Elite Wrestling - the roster features world-class talent including Jon Moxley, Toni Storm, MJF, Ricochet and Adam Page.
Get Daley: Drama series about a rogue. Arthur is not even safe in hospital when he witnesses the death of a business associate and a friend of Terry's is in the frame for it.
If They Do Go Either Way, They're Usually Fake: American sitcom. Judith is worried when Jake draws the tattooed buttocks of a female surfer friend of Charlie for a school assignment.
Twenty-Five Little Pre-Pubers Without a Snoot-Ful: American sitcom. Charlie handles a roomful of fourth graders alone after Alan and Judith argue during the rehearsals for a show.

The Potter's Field: Another adventure for the medieval sleuthing monk. A potter enters the monastery after the death of his wife, but the other monks suspect that he murdered her.

Studio guest Ray Wilkins joins Brian Moore for action from February 1978 as Chelsea face Manchester United, Sheffield Wednesday take on Port Vale, and Walsall host Shrewsbury Town.
It's the fifth round of the FA Cup, and Brian Moore is bringing us the highlights straight from February 1978 as Chelsea face Leyton Orient and Bristol Rovers battle Ipswich Town.

Sharpe's Rifles: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. After saving the life of Sir Arthur Wellesley, Sergeant Richard Sharpe is rewarded with a mission to locate a missing agent.
Sharpe's Eagle: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. Wellesley orders Sharpe to ensure that an arranged mission involving an incompetent colonel's new regiment is a success.

programmes.show_name: Formula E: CUPRA Raval Madrid E-Prix
programmes.show_description: Nicki Shields presents coverage of Round 6 of the Formula E season at the Circuito Permanente Del Jarama in Madrid.
Henry Cole visits the Isle of Man, drops into the famous Ace Cafe on the North Circular, and brings the restoration of his BSA Goldstar to a climax with a mass ride-out.
Action-adventure film sequel starring Jason Statham and Curtis '50 Cent' Jackson, 2023. The team of elite mercenaries reunites - with new blood - to tackle an arms dealer in Libya.
